name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W214/S214 plug-in hybrid (2.0L 4-cyl petrol + electric)

serviceNotes.engine oil: M254-based four-cylinder PHEV: 15,000 km / 12 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service when combustion mileage drives ASSYST.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Cabin dust filter per Mercedes-Benz W214 maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24 months per Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Regen extends pad life; inspections remain mandatory.
serviceNotes.coolant: Engine coolant circuit 150,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-Benz W214 PHEV service manual.
serviceNotes.high-voltage battery coolant: 120,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-Benz high-voltage service manual supplement (traction battery thermal coolant).
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: Hybrid-integrated automatic: preventive ATF ~60,000 km specialist practice.
serviceNotes.transfer case oil: 4MATIC E 300 e variants only; ~60,000 km preventive.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Supplementary engine coolant ~120,000 km if not yet due.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection PHEV: intake cleaning ~120,000 km if carbon symptoms appear.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (Tier 2 four-cylinder petrol proxy; W214 PHEV — auto-abc has no 2024 row)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W214; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W214 PHEV
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W214 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.spark plugs: 60,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (Tier 2 spark row; months not stated)
serviceSources.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-Benz W214 PHEV service manual (engine coolant)
serviceSources.high-voltage battery coolant: 120,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-Benz high-voltage service manual supplement (battery thermal coolant; 5-year time cap per platform rule)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: Hybrid automatic preventive ATF ~60,000 km — specialist practice
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary engine coolant exchange ~120,000 km preventive
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection PHEV — intake cleaning ~120,000 km when symptoms warrant — specialist practice
